features.featureTitle: Audit and fix the Internet Identity login flow in ChatView and useInternetIdentity so that a user can successfully initiate and complete login. The login button must be visible and interactive, the AuthClient must open the Internet Identity popup without errors, and after authentication the app must transition from the unauthenticated state to the authenticated/profile-setup state without hanging or throwing errors.

Audit the useActor hook initialisation sequence to ensure that once a user is authenticated via Internet Identity, the backend actor is created with the correct authenticated identity and is non-null before any backend calls are made. If the actor fails to initialise after login, add a retry mechanism and surface a user-facing error message rather than silently hanging.
